case_title: TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS INC. VS. MENEMSHA DEVELOPMENT GROUP INC DBA CONTACTOR et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-02-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-21-2013 CONTINUED TO OCT-02-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS INC. SERVED MAR-26-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENEMSHA DEVELOPMENT GROUP INC DBA CONTACTOR MANAGEMENT GROUP, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MENEMSHA DEVELOPMENT GROUP INC DBA CONTACTOR MANAGEMENT GROUP, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1 THRU 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-21-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-21-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-06-2013
